creator: bsd@bontempi.net
text:
I have been monitoring htop for the past several days, and I must say it does not dump core at the moment.

Could it have been an issue on some other part of the servers environment?

We do have htop running on all of our servers (about a dozen at the moment), as tmux session.

I will continue monitoring htop and report back in case I see issues.

In that case, I will make sure to attach the core dumped, for possible analysis.

Thanks for checking this.
